## Scope

- [ ] Requirements and acceptance criteria are unchanged, or `project/requirements.toml` is updated.
- [ ] Architecture/public-contract changes include an ADR or explicit rationale.
- [ ] Affected workflows, schemas, compatibility baselines, and evidence are updated.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes update the threat model or explain why no review is required.
- [ ] `python3 tools/validate_project.py` and relevant compatibility gates pass.
- [ ] User-facing changes update `CHANGELOG.md`; release migrations have a versioned note.
